name: cerebro-analyst
description: Deep research, signal analysis, foresight synthesis. The sense-making layer. Needs full knowledge base context and frontier-grade reasoning. This is the intelligence core.

compute._note: Routes through LiteLLM: 'frontier'=claude-opus-4-6, 'voice-critical'=claude-sonnet-4-6. Change providers in config/litellm.yaml with zero agent code changes.

_tools_note: Declarative capability descriptions — not implemented MCP endpoints yet. Phase D implementation target. Each maps to a Cowork built-in tool or future Queen API call.

mcps.name: web_search
mcps.purpose: Research across AI, foresight, biotech, quantum, org design, geopolitics

mcps.name: gmail
mcps.purpose: Read emails for context — expert networks, client comms, opportunities
mcps.note: READ ONLY — cerebro never sends email

mcps.name: google_calendar
mcps.purpose: Read calendar for meeting prep context
mcps.note: READ ONLY — cerebro never creates/modifies events
